film.title: Slums of Beverly Hills
film.overview: In 1976, a lower-middle-class teenager struggles to cope living with her neurotic family of nomads on the outskirts of Beverly Hills.

dialogues.dialogue: Who's talking about Mom?  What we got is fine.  I don't want you acting ashamed or embarrassed.  We're staying in Beverly Hills for the good schools.  You got a good address, OK?
